DELIVERED.title: Delivered
DELIVERED.description: This card triggers an additional effect when it is[gold]delivered[/gold].
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-ANTI_GRAVITY: Apply {ImbalancePower:diff()} Imbalance, deal {DisplayedDamage} [gold]spell[/gold] damage, and give the target {TemporaryFlyPower:diff()} Temporary Fly.
Apply {ImbalancePower:diff()} Imbalance, deal {DisplayedDamage} [gold]spell[/gold] damage, and give the target {TemporaryFlyPower:diff()} Temporary Fly.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-TOUCH_AND_TU: If the target has[gold]Imbalance[/gold], immediately make it enter[gold]Weightless[/gold]. Gain{Energy:energyIcons()}for every20[gold]Imbalance[/gold]removed this way.
Retain. If the target has[gold]Imbalance[/gold], immediately make it enter[gold]Weightless[/gold]. Gain{Energy:energyIcons()}for every20[gold]Imbalance[/gold]removed this way.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-GRAVITY_NODE: Apply{ImbalancePower}[gold]Imbalance[/gold], then deal{Damage}damage. If this card makes the target enter[gold]Weightless[/gold]/kills the target, permanently increase this card's applied[gold]Imbalance[/gold]/damage by{ImbalanceIncrease}/{DamageIncrease}.

Apply{ImbalancePower}[gold]Imbalance[/gold], then deal{Damage}damage. If this card makes the target enter[gold]Weightless[/gold]/kills the target, permanently increase this card's applied[gold]Imbalance[/gold]/damage by{ImbalanceIncrease}/{DamageIncrease}.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-DELIVERY_FLO: Deal{Damage:diff()}damage. Choose1card in your hand and send it.
Deal{Damage:diff()}damage. Choose1card in your hand and send it.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-PACKAGE_PREV: Deal{Damage:diff()}damage. Gain the most recently sent card, then put it on top of your draw pile.
Deal{Damage:diff()}damage. Gain the most recently sent card, then put it on top of your draw pile.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-EARLY_DELIVE: Immediately gain your sent cards. Apply{ImbalancePower:diff()}[gold]Imbalance[/gold]to all enemies.
Immediately gain your sent cards. Apply{ImbalancePower:diff()}[gold]Imbalance[/gold]to all enemies.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-MIRACLE_COUR: Send all other cards in your hand. Then draw that many cards.
Send all other cards in your hand. Then draw that many cards.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-PACKAGE_EXPR: Choose1card in your hand and send it. Draw{Cards:diff()}cards.
Choose1card in your hand and send it. Draw{Cards:diff()}cards.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-LITTLE_TRICK: Choose 1 other card in your hand. Create a copy of it and [gold]send[/gold] the copy.
Choose 1 other card in your hand. Create a copy of it and [gold]send[/gold] the copy.
LITTLE_TRICK.selectPrompt: Choose a card to copy and send.
Deal {DisplayedDamage} [gold]spell[/gold] damage. [gold]Send[/gold] a copy of this card.
Deal {DisplayedDamage} [gold]spell[/gold] damage. [gold]Send[/gold] a copy of this card.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-HOVER.title: Hover
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-CHARGED_IMPA:
Apply {ImbalancePower:diff()} [gold]Imbalance[/gold]. Deal {DisplayedDamage} [gold]spell[/gold] damage.
[gold]Delivered[/gold]: Randomize this combat's energy cost.

CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-STARBEAM.des: Deal {DisplayedDamage} [gold]spell[/gold] damage. If the target is [gold]Airborne[/gold], deal {DisplayedDamage} [gold]spell[/gold] damage again.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-STARBEAM.upg: Deal {DisplayedDamage} [gold]spell[/gold] damage. If the target is [gold]Airborne[/gold], deal {DisplayedDamage} [gold]spell[/gold] damage again.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-AERIAL_SUPPR: Give the target {FlyPower:diff()} [gold]Fly[/gold] and make it lose {StrengthLoss:diff()} Strength this turn.
Give the target {FlyPower:diff()} [gold]Fly[/gold] and make it lose {StrengthLoss:diff()} Strength this turn.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-LIME_STORM.d: Deal {DisplayedDamage} [gold]spell[/gold] damage to the target. Deal {SplashDamage} damage to all enemies.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-LIME_STORM.u: Deal {DisplayedDamage} [gold]spell[/gold] damage to the target. Deal {SplashDamage} damage to all enemies.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-UP_THERE.des: Gain {DisplayedBlock} [gold]spell[/gold] Block. If you are [gold]Airborne[/gold], apply {ImbalancePower:diff()} [gold]Imbalance[/gold] to all enemies that are not [gold]Airborne[/gold].
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-UP_THERE.upg: Gain {DisplayedBlock} [gold]spell[/gold] Block. If you are [gold]Airborne[/gold], apply {ImbalancePower:diff()} [gold]Imbalance[/gold] to all enemies that are not [gold]Airborne[/gold].
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-DOWN_HERE.de: If you are not [gold]Airborne[/gold], apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] and {ImbalancePower} [gold]Imbalance[/gold] to all [gold]Airborne[/gold] enemies. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-DOWN_HERE.up: If you are not [gold]Airborne[/gold], apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] and {ImbalancePower} [gold]Imbalance[/gold] to all [gold]Airborne[/gold] enemies. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage twice. If this damage causes the enemy to leave [gold]Airborne[/gold], gain {EnergyGain:energyIcons()}.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage twice. If this damage causes the enemy to leave [gold]Airborne[/gold], gain {EnergyGain:energyIcons()}.
Deal {DisplayedDamage} [gold]spell[/gold] damage. If the target is in [gold]Imbalance[/gold], draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
Deal {DisplayedDamage} [gold]spell[/gold] damage. If the target is in [gold]Imbalance[/gold], draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-PRISM_RAY.de: Deal {DisplayedDamage} [gold]spell[/gold] damage. Transform all [gold]delivered[/gold] cards{IfUpgraded:show: and upgrade them}.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-PRISM_RAY.up: Deal {DisplayedDamage} [gold]spell[/gold] damage. Transform all [gold]delivered[/gold] cards and upgrade them.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-UPDRAFT.desc: At the start of your turn, gain 1 [gold]Temporary Fly[/gold]. If you become [gold]grounded[/gold] by an attack, shuffle a Dazed into your draw pile.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-UPDRAFT.upgr: At the start of your turn, gain 1 [gold]Temporary Fly[/gold]. If you become [gold]grounded[/gold] by an attack, shuffle a Dazed into your draw pile.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-GRAVITY_BARR: Gain {DisplayedBlock} [gold]spell[/gold] Block. This turn, whenever damage from an enemy is fully blocked, apply {GravityBarrierPower:diff()} [gold]Imbalance[/gold] to the source.
Gain {DisplayedBlock} [gold]spell[/gold] Block. This turn, whenever damage from an enemy is fully blocked, apply {GravityBarrierPower:diff()} [gold]Imbalance[/gold] to the source.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-PRECISION_AD: All enemies gain {ImbalancePower:diff()} [gold]Imbalance[/gold]. Next turn, they lose {PrecisionAdjustmentPower} [gold]Imbalance[/gold].
All enemies gain {ImbalancePower:diff()} [gold]Imbalance[/gold]. Next turn, they lose {PrecisionAdjustmentPower} [gold]Imbalance[/gold].
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-EMERGENCY_SP: Shuffle a [gold]Dazed[/gold] into your discard pile. Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}. Draw {Cards} card.
Shuffle a [gold]Dazed[/gold] into your discard pile. Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}. Draw {Cards} card.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-COURIER_TRAI: At the start of each turn, gain {CourierTrainingPower:diff()} [gold]Fly[/gold].
At the start of each turn, gain {CourierTrainingPower:diff()} [gold]Fly[/gold].
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-QUICK_DISPAT: Randomly choose 1 [gold]delivered[/gold] card and deliver it immediately.
Choose 1 [gold]delivered[/gold] card and deliver it immediately.
QUICK_DISPATCH.selectPrompt: Choose a card to deliver immediately
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-WEIGHT_CALIB: Apply {ImbalancePower:diff()} [gold]Imbalance[/gold]. If the target is already [gold]Weightless[/gold], apply it again.
Apply {ImbalancePower:diff()} [gold]Imbalance[/gold]. If the target is already [gold]Weightless[/gold], apply it again.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-IM_COMING_DO: Lose all [gold]Fly[/gold]. For each stack lost, deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
Lose all [gold]Fly[/gold]. For each stack lost, deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-TWO_STAGE_SP: Gain {Block} [gold]Block[/gold]. If you have played a card with the same name this combat, gain {TemporaryFlyPower} [gold]Temporary Fly[/gold].
Gain {Block} [gold]Block[/gold]. If you have played a card with the same name this combat, gain {TemporaryFlyPower} [gold]Temporary Fly[/gold].
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-ENERGY_CYCLE: Each turn, when you play an [gold]Attack[/gold], [gold]Skill[/gold], or [gold]Power[/gold] card that costs at least 2 Energy, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}. Each type can trigger up to {EnergyCyclePower} times.

Each turn, when you play an [gold]Attack[/gold], [gold]Skill[/gold], or [gold]Power[/gold] card that costs at least 2 Energy, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}. Each type can trigger up to {EnergyCyclePower} times.
